title: Pivot-RP: A Software to Find Grant Opportunities — D-RED Seminar Slides (Isuk)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-04-06 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Pivot-RP: A Software to Find Grant Opportunities' presented by Edet Isuk, PhD. Introduces the Pivot-RP funding-opportunity database tool used at MSU. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/y6hA8Hv7GG0bSN4C0nF-_LV1PAUgRRw245GeXPHgNhSKKCbuSMWEedfZyiWGGFd6.5ehTAD9cahXWvbUf
